Notice Of Motion For Order To Quash To Set Aside Default, And Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FENG ZHU'S Motion For Order To Quash Service Of Summons, Set Aside Default, And Vacate Default Judgment.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED ON DECEMBER 5, 2008. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion For Order To Quash To Set Aside Default, And Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Continued To Dec-18-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lawrence D. Miller (592.9151) for defendant and moving party
Kurtiss Jacobs of Mann Bracken (925.969.1900 x3090) for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT FENG ZHU'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS, TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT, AND VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT is continued to December 18, 2008. Parties to submit further briefing regarding the issues of service and running of the statute of limitations and whether it should be a condition of granting the motion to set aside as follows: defendant/moving party's brief by December 5, 2008; opposition by December 11, 2008; reply by December 16, 2008. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
